name: ruixen-live-waveform
title: Ruixen Live Waveform
author: Ruixen UI
description: Visualizes microphone frequency data or a bounded processing state on a responsive canvas.

changes: Repointed the source utility import to the copied Ruixen utility subset.
Bounded draw geometry and device pixel ratio, cached layout and color reads, paused offscreen and hidden work, and reduced active sampling under reduced motion.
Added accessible canvas labeling, non-submit stop behavior, caller-owned microphone error reporting, and complete animation, observer, stream, and audio-context cleanup.
Copied only the source cn helper and its clsx and tailwind-merge imports, omitting unrelated application metadata, environment, fetch, date, and text helpers.

license.scope: registry/ruixenui/live-waveform.tsx and the cn subset of lib/utils.ts

modifications.change: Made the copied canvas loop bounded, visibility-aware, reduced-motion-aware, error-reporting, and fully disposable.
modifications.reason: Keep the source waveform renderer without perpetual hidden work, unsafe geometry, console-only failures, or leaked browser resources.

modifications.change: Reduced the source application utility file to the exact cn closure used by the component.
modifications.reason: Avoid shipping unrelated Next-specific application code while preserving the source class-merging behavior.
